question_text: Use the timeline shown below of the Russian Revolution. Which event preceded the October Revolution?

answer_key.explanation: The Tsar abdicated in February 1917, several months before the October Revolution of the same year.
common_mistakes: Treating the USSR formation as preceding the revolutions.

visual.caption: Russian Revolution event sequence.
visual.altText: A four-event horizontal timeline running across 1905 to 1924 with dated event labels.
